policy.duplicate_records: group records sharing the same valid ISBN or fully compatible bibliographic metadata; preserve every source record through source_record_ids and source_record_count without inferring a physical copy count
policy.external_metadata: use exact ISBN matches only; never replace a non-empty CLZ value without a manual, sourced override
policy.cover_metadata: prefer exact ISBN matches; otherwise require a strict title-author-year-publisher edition match and preserve provider provenance

normalization_policy.compatible_record_definition: Same normalized title, compatible author lists, no conflicting ISBN, year, publisher or series, and either shared bibliographic evidence or one clearly incomplete record.

clz_sibling.title: Another CLZ record with the same valid ISBN
